task_completion.description: Verify the promotion name and display name are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form where the 'Name' field contains exactly 'Spring Clearance 30% Off' and the 'Display name' field contains exactly '30% Off Spring Clearance'.

task_completion.description: Verify the promotion is enabled and assigned to the correct store.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Stores' selection area ensuring 'Urban Electronics' is selected or checked. Also verify that the 'Enabled' checkbox is checked (active).

task_completion.description: Verify the offer is set to a 30% discount on the order subtotal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Offer type' dropdown set to 'Percentage off the order subtotal' (or similar wording) and the percentage amount field containing '30' or '0.30'.

task_completion.description: Verify the minimum order amount condition is set to $150.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Conditions' section showing an order total condition (e.g., 'Current order total') configured with an amount of '150' or '150.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the coupon code and usage limit are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Coupons' section or a related coupon creation form showing the code 'SPRING30' and a usage limit (e.g., 'Maximum usage', 'Usage limit') set to '50'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Drupal Commerce web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Drupal admin interface (e.g., /admin/commerce/promotions), not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually filled out and saved the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the progression of entering data into the form fields and a success message indicating the promotion was saved, rather than just a static text file or mocked HTML.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (F12/Inspect) should not be open and used to alter the DOM text to simulate task completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified requirements for the Drupal Commerce promotion: Promotion Name must be 'Spring Clearance 30% Off', Display Name must be '30% Off Spring Clearance'. The Offer Type is 'order_percentage_off' (Percentage off the order subtotal) with a value of 0.30 (30%). The promotion must be enabled and assigned to the 'Urban Electronics' store. A condition for minimum order amount must be set to 150.0. The promotion must require a coupon, specifically using the code 'SPRING30' with a usage limit of 50.
